name: RTK (Rust Token Killer)
description: Run a dev command through RTK (Rust Token Killer) and get a token-compressed version of its output (60-90% fewer tokens), exposed as a declarative `command` tool that shells out to the locally-installed `rtk` binary. BYO — no API key.
tagline: Token-compress noisy dev-command output for agents

config.description: Run a dev command through RTK (Rust Token Killer) and return a token-compressed version of its output (60-90% fewer tokens). Prefer this over running noisy commands (git status/log/diff, test runners, build tools, ls/find/grep) directly — you get the same information for a fraction of the context.

command.description: The dev command to run through RTK, e.g. "git status", "cargo test", "ls -la". RTK runs it and returns a token-compressed version of its output.

mode.description: wrap (default): filter+compress the output. proxy: run raw with tracking (no filtering). test: keep only failures. err: keep only errors.

fields.label: Auto-wrap the Ryu (Pi) agent's commands
fields.description: When on, Ryu configures RTK's PreToolUse hook for the Pi agent so its shell commands are token-compressed automatically. Requires rtk on PATH.

fields.label: Auto-wrap Claude Code's commands
fields.description: Same, for the Claude Code agent.
